narrative:
Cuy Falls 7-C (precinct in Summit County) has 1,103 registered voters, with 60.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.6%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.7 percentage points.
